title: Local Mini App URL resolution and Telegram HTTPS diagnostics
acceptanceCriteria: Current Mini App URL resolution is inspected in bot, shared, and bootstrap sources.
Runtime inline /start and /menu never send unsafe HTTP/local URLs in Telegram web_app payloads.

Local dev with HAPPYTG_MINIAPP_PORT=3007, HAPPYTG_APP_URL=http://localhost:3007, and HAPPYTG_PUBLIC_URL=http://localhost:4000 resolves diagnostics to the Mini App port and explains public HTTPS launch requirements.
Public HTTPS HAPPYTG_MINIAPP_URL enables inline Mini App buttons.
telegram menu set and related bootstrap validation still reject localhost, HTTP, private, and unsafe URLs as hard failures.
Doctor/verify diagnostics classify local HTTP Mini App launch URLs as acceptable local polling info while production/menu setup remains strict.
Docs and .env.example are synchronized with local 3007 and public HTTPS guidance.
